title: [FIRRTL] Add parser-timing firtool option
body:
Add the `--parser-timing` option to firtool. If present, the time taken to parse the FIRRTL or MLIR input is emitted alongside any other potential statistics. Fixes #608.

For example, `firtool test/ExportVerilog/rtl-dialect.mlir -verilog --pass-timing --parser-timing` produces the following output:
```
  MLIR Parser Execution Time: 0.0135 seconds

===-------------------------------------------------------------------------===
                      ... Pass execution timing report ...
===-------------------------------------------------------------------------===
  Total Execution Time: 0.0497 seconds

   ---User Time---   ---Wall Time---  --- Name ---
   0.0026 (  4.7%)     0.0026 (  5.1%)  LowerFIRRTLToRTL
   0.0055 ( 10.2%)     0.0011 (  2.2%)  'rtl.module' Pipeline
   0.0055 ( 10.2%)     0.0011 (  2.2%)    RTLCleanup
   0.0035 (  6.5%)     0.0035 (  7.1%)  CSE
   0.0001 (  0.2%)     0.0001 (  0.2%)    (A) DominanceInfo
   0.0425 ( 78.5%)     0.0425 ( 85.5%)  Canonicalizer
   0.0541 (100.0%)     0.0497 (100.0%)  Total
```

### Todo
- Rebase onto #1042 once that's merged
